mano_cua.result_summary: 应用完全无法渲染：vue-hot-reload-api的exports.install函数尝试访问_LifecycleHooks时返回undefined导致Vue初始化崩溃，页面空白无任何内容，无法测试Cell组件样式
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The application fails to render entirely. Console shows TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading '_LifecycleHooks') from vue-hot-reload-api (app.js:2852:1). Vue initialization crashes, page is completely blank. Cell component testing impossible.
